groupings.title: Yuumi workflow skills
groupings.description: Authoring, planning, and HTML-artifact skills that ride along on any agent: pressure-test a plan with a deep interview, edit drafts in place with inline {curly-brace} notes, render Anthropic-style HTML explainers, implement a spec with a running decision log, review someone else's change by building understanding actively so the judgment stays yours, and a teacher that won't stop until you actually understand the work.

groupings.title: Claude Code statusline (Claude Code only)
groupings.description: Install and diagnose the Tokyo Night powerline statusline for Claude Code — a HUD with 5h/7d rate-limit bars, context usage, model, git branch, and IME state. These skills wire and repair settings.json; they are no-ops on other agents. The -ad variant installs the HUD alongside a statusline-owning ad extension (Kickbacks/vibe-ads) instead of fighting it.
